auth.onboardingTagline: Onye na-ahụ maka nchekwa onwe onye maka oge dị n'etiti "Adị m mma" na "Achọrọ m enyemaka."
auth.createSubtitle: Họrọ usoro nbanye iji chebe eserese eserese gị.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Anyị enweghị ike ịbanye. Lelee njikọ gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Iji nnọkọ mmepe mpaghara. Native Google Sign-In na-arụ ọrụ na ụlọ mmepe.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Jikọọ ugbu a ma ọ bụ gaa n'ihu ma gbakwunye ya mgbe e mesịrị.
auth.northStarBody: The VL01 wearable nwere ike ịkpalite nchekwa eruba na taps na ogologo pịa mmegharị.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Gị nwayọọ nchekwa enyi na map na na oku.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear nwere ike inyere aka na ọnọdụ ụlọ, ọnọdụ onye nlekọta, ọnọdụ mberede, oku ngọpụ, na nkwado olu.
auth.remindersReady: Ihe ncheta dị nro dị njikere.

permissions.locationSubtitle: A na-eji ya maka map, mpaghara ihe ize ndụ, mbata nchekwa, na ọnọdụ SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving na-arịọ maka ebe ndị nlekọta nwere ike ịghọta ebe enyemaka nwere ike ịchọ. Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe nke a mgbe e mesịrị na Ntọala.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Ịma ọkwa na-akwado nlele na ihe omume mberede.
permissions.notificationsBody: Anyị na-eji ọkwa naanị maka mkpali nchekwa, mmelite mberede, na ihe ncheta ị na-enye.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Ọnọdụ na-eme ka ọnọdụ nchekwa dị mma
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving na-eji ọnọdụ gị maka maapụ nchekwa, mpaghara ihe ize ndụ, ịkekọrịta ngwa ngwa, na ọnọdụ SOS. Ị nwere ike ịgbanwe nke a mgbe e mesịrị na Ntọala.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving na-eziga ihe ncheta, mmelite mberede, na ihe nchebe ị na-enye. Anyị anaghị eji ọkwa maka mgbasa ozi.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Igwe okwu na-eme ka oku nchekwa
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving na-eji igwe okwu gị naanị mgbe ị na-amalite enyi AI ma ọ bụ oku nchekwa.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving na-eji Bluetooth jikọtara ya na ọla NorthStar, gụọ ọnọdụ njikọ, ma kpalite nchekwa nchebe site na wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving na-eji igwefoto naanị mgbe ị na-ahọrọ ịse foto profaịlụ ma ọ bụ kesaa foto nchekwa.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving na-eme ka usoro a dị site na Ntọala na dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Họrọ olu enyi nke na-eche na ọ dị nchebe ịnụ.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: A na-eji nlekọta dị jụụ maka nchebe kwa ụbọchị.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Soro ndị tụkwasịrị obi kerịta ihe gbara ya gburugburu.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tap ise nwere ike ịbawanye na SOS na Guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Mepụta ezigbo ihe mere ị ga-eji hapụ ọnọdụ na-adịghị mma.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Kpọọ ezigbo oge ma ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ nkwado.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Gbalịa nchebe na-aga n'ihu na a ala-nrụgide demo.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Debe ọla dị nso mgbe ị na-enyocha ya.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning enweghị ike ịmalite. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
jewelry.scanFailed: Anyị enweghị ike ịchọta ọla dị nso. Lelee Bluetooth, jide NorthStar nso ma nwaa ọzọ.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning enweghị ike ịmalite. Lelee Bluetooth nweta ma nwàá ọzọ.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ngwaọrụ dị nso na-agbanyụ. Kwe ka Bluetooth nweta na Ntọala, wee nwaa ọzọ.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar were ogologo oge iji jikọọ. Mee ka ọ dịkwuo nso ma nwaa ọzọ.
jewelry.connectFailed: Anyị enweghị ike ijikọ NorthStar. Jide n'aka na a na-akwụ ya ụgwọ ma dị nso, wee nwaa ọzọ.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Jide NorthStar ebubo ma dị nso na ekwentị a, wee nyochaa ọzọ.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Chọọ NorthStar ngwaọrụ ndị dị nso ...

map.notRequested: Achọghị ka e nweta ebe. Ị nwere ike ime nke a mgbe e mesịrị site na ntọala.
map.permissionOff: Ohere ebe a gbanyụọla. Mee ka ọ dị na Ntọala iji mee ka map nchekwa dị n'ebe ị nọ.
map.timeout: Ọnọdụ gị na-ewe ogologo oge karịa ka a tụrụ anya ya. Gaa ebe na mgbaàmà doro anya ma nwaa ọzọ.

map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

contacts.emptyMessage: Tinye onye ị tụkwasịrị obi ka ha wee dị njikere mgbe nchekwa chọrọ ha.
contacts.removeMessage: Onye a agaghịzi apụta na mberede mberede gị.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Anyị enweghị ike ịchekwa kọntaktị a. Lelee nkọwa zuru ezu ma nwaa ọzọ.

capybearTap.body: Ụzọ mmegharị ahụ dị njikere maka wiring ihe omume BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: O yiri ka ị na-anọghị n'ịntanetị. A ga-eziga ozi gị mgbe ị na-ejikọta.
errors.voiceQueued: Ozi a zọpụtara. A ga-eziga ya mgbe onye na-ahụ maka olu na-ejikọta.
errors.voiceRetrying: Daalụ maka izipu ozi gị ọzọ.
errors.voiceConnecting: Jikọọ na onye na-ege gị ntị n'enweghị nsogbu.
errors.microphone: Igwe okwu dị mkpa maka oku olu. Ị nwere ike ime ya na Ntọala, ma ọ bụ pịnye ozi kama.
errors.billing: A naghị eji ụda olu eme ihe n'ịntanetị nwa oge. Ị nwere ike ịga n'ihu na onye na-anọghị n'ịntanetị.
errors.authentication: Onye ọrụ olu ahụ enweghị ike inyocha nnọkọ a. Banye ọzọ ma ọ bụ jiri onye na-anọghị n'ịntanetị maka ugbu a.
errors.timeout: Onye na-ekwu okwu na-ewe ogologo oge iji zaghachi. Lelee njikọ gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
errors.network: Anyị enweghị ike ịbịakwute onye na-akpakọrịta olu. Lelee njikọ gị, wee nwaa ọzọ ma ọ bụ gaa n'ihu na-anọghị n'ịntanetị.
errors.genericVoice: Ihe kwụsịrị oku olu ahụ. Gbalịa ọzọ, ma ọ bụ gaa n'ihu na onye na-anọghị n'ịntanetị.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving chọrọ ohere igwe okwu maka nchekwa na AI oku ndị enyi.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving na-eji ọnọdụ gị maka map nchekwa na atụmatụ nchekwa dị nso.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving na-eji Bluetooth iji jikọọ na ọla nchekwa NorthStar gị.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Nhọrọ nbanye a adịghị na ụdị a.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Gaa n'ihu dịka demo (maka mmepe naanị)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Ọnọdụ demo na-eji naanị data adịgboroja echekwara n'ime ngwaọrụ. Ekwenyebeghị ọrụ ndị ejikọrọ, a ga-emegharịkwa nnọkọ a mgbe ngwa ahụ bugharịrị.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Koodu nkwenye ahụ ezighi ezi ma ọ bụ kubie ume. Rịọ koodu ọhụrụ wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Mgbalị nbanye karịrị akarị. Chere obere oge, wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Nkwenye nbanye were ogologo oge. Lelee njikọ gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Anyị enweghị ike iru ọrụ nbanye. Lelee njikọ gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Oge nnọkọ gị agwụla. Banye ọzọ.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Maapụ nchekwa enweghị ike ibugo. Lelee njikọ gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Ebe ị nọ ugbu a adịghị. A na-egosi ebe ikpeazụ echekwara na %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Anyị enweghị ike ịkekọrịta ebe ị nọ. Lelee ikike ebe wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Nke a bụ ebe m nọ e dekọrọ na %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Nke a bụ ebe ikpeazụ m chekwara e dekọrọ na %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Agbanyụrụ ikike Bluetooth. Gbanwuo ya na Ntọala, wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Agbanyụrụ Bluetooth. Gbanwuo ya, wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Njikọ Bluetooth adịghị na ngwaọrụ ma ọ bụ ụdị a.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Anyị ahụghị NorthStar. Debe ya nso, lelee Bluetooth, wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ahụghị ngwaọrụ NorthStar ọ bụla dị nso. Debe ya nso wee nyochaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Anyị enweghị ike ijikọ na NorthStar. Debe ya ka o nwee chajị ma nọrọ nso, wee nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Anyị enweghị ike ichekwa ebe a. Nwaa ọzọ.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Ihe ịkpọ ekwentị meghere; ekwenyeghị na a kpọrọ oku.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: A kagbuola; a kpọghị oku ọ bụla.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ọ nweghị onye kọntaktị mberede dị; a kpọghị oku ọ bụla.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Ihe ịkpọ ekwentị enweghị ike imeghe; a kpọghị oku ọ bụla.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Enweghị ike ikwenye mgbalị SOS ikpeazụ.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Onye enyemaka olu adịghị ugbu a. Nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa ma ọ bụ jiri onye enyemaka na-anọghị n'ịntanetị gaa n'ihu.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
